column317:
Good evening all, 

genie.study analysis department has finished their research on suki's software (resold by Ekon, Flux, Tyrone (im 90% sure), and more perhaps) in just under one day! Taking even less longer than our other study. First of all, for all normal end users, genie.study analysis department **STRONGLY ADVISES YOU CHANGE YOUR COLLEGEBOARD PASSWORD/EMAIL IF POSSIBLE ASAP IF YOU HAVE USED ANY OF THE AFOREMENTIONED PRODUCTS** 

We were surprised by a lack of any real software protection, not even a packer was present on any binaries analyzed, and a lack of effort put into this product with their manual mapper/loader being 1:1 pasted from TheCruZ's manual mapper on github/unknowncheats. There's also likely ChatGPT'd code, based off the comments in their core javascript logic (executed at line 28 in the logger javascript) and most surprisingly, a logger that will log both your CollegeBoard email and password when at the login page in Bluebook (along with all the information CollegeBoard logs by default about your computer, which is completely unnecessary and no software should need to do this) 

The credential logger (which is present in the dll that we dumped from the loader xor'd with the 1 byte key 0x5A, the decryption logic is in a subroutine starting at file offset 0x5820 in the attached dll for technical users looking to analyze it yourself) loads the core logic after the server receives your email/password with the response containing a field with the core logic ( which we have dumped and is also attached :P ) so even if you have just loaded it to practice once (not even on a real SAT), consider your CollegeBoard compromised and change your password ASAP. 

All attached binaries are for ANALYSIS purposes ONLY, hence the .bin at the end so you dont accidentally execute anything on your own computer. These will NOT work on your computer as the account used for analysis is now banned ( took too late buddy :{ ) 

Also for people analyzing that care, the login logger is in the dll and is not remotely loaded/eval'd and starts at file offset 0x115C72 (xor each byte with 0x5A as aforementioned). 

Stay safe,
mori + sc + 🐸
